query:
-- Of the 943 Apollo-source contacts, what's the trust tier breakdown?
-- This tells us how many Apollo reveals actually reached send_ready
SELECT 
  contactTrustTier,
  verificationStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts
WHERE enrichmentSource = 'apollo'
GROUP BY contactTrustTier, verificationStatus
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute

-- This tells us how many Apollo reveals actually reached send_ready
SELECT 
  contactTrustTier,
  verificationStatus,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM contacts

GROUP BY contactTrustTier, verificationStatus
ORDER BY count DESC;
